quick_fit_high.title: Head of Operations
quick_fit_high.description: Lead operations for a venture-backed gaming studio. Own P&L, team leadership, process scaling, KPI dashboards, and digital transformation initiatives. Hybrid/remote within Poland.

quick_fit_low.title: Operator sprzętu (koparka) (k/m/x)
quick_fit_low.description: Obsługa koparki na budowie. Prawo jazdy kat. C. Brak wymagań IT ani zarządzania.

quick_fit_medium.title: Delivery Excellence and Quality Manager
quick_fit_medium.description: Manage delivery quality for consulting engagements. Stakeholder management, governance, some transformation exposure. Not a pure COO role but operations-adjacent leadership.

quick_fit_security.title: EMEA Information Security Director
quick_fit_security.description: Lead regional cybersecurity strategy, ISO 27001, SOC, incident response, CISO-level stakeholder management. Deep InfoSec leadership required.

tailor_job.raw_text: Head of Operations Technology & Digital Transformation. Requirements: Odoo ERP, KPI, P&L, team leadership, digital transformation, CI/CD. Location: Poland, hybrid.

evaluate_job.raw_text: Head of Operations Technology & Digital Transformation at Kuchnia Vikinga. Lead operations technology, Odoo ERP ecosystem, KPI reporting, team leadership, AI-enabled automation. Hybrid Poland. B2B 25-35k PLN/month.
